question: Among Bexar, El Paso, Hidalgo, and Montgomery counties, which county is part of the under-900,000 population group in the census of the year before the year (within 2017-2022) that has the highest total Charter flight passengers over Los Angeles international airports and is listed as part of West Texas? Return the county name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Filtering FlightType = "Charter" and summing Passenger_Count by year (from ReportPeriod) for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 25993 in 2021.
